scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @groceryview/core && npm run build -w @groceryview/analytics && npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/ops && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/scanning && npm run build -w @groceryview/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @groceryview/core && npm run build -w @groceryview/analytics && npm run build -w @groceryview/geo && npm run build -w @groceryview/api && npm run build -w @groceryview/api-contracts && npm run build -w @groceryview/auth && npm run build -w @groceryview/notifications && npm run build -w @groceryview/server && npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/jobs && npm run build -w @groceryview/scanning && npm run build -w @groceryview/monetization && npm run build -w @groceryview/ops && npm run build -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run build -w @groceryview/image-cache && npm run build -w @groceryview/ingestion && npm run build -w @groceryview/mobile && npm run build -w @groceryview/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @groceryview/core && npm run test -w @groceryview/analytics && npm run test -w @groceryview/geo && npm run test -w @groceryview/api && npm run test -w @groceryview/api-contracts && npm run test -w @groceryview/auth && npm run test -w @groceryview/notifications && npm run test -w @groceryview/server && npm run test -w @groceryview/db && npm run test -w @groceryview/jobs && npm run test -w @groceryview/scanning && npm run test -w @groceryview/monetization && npm run test -w @groceryview/ops && npm run test -w @groceryview/catalog && npm run test -w @groceryview/image-cache && npm run test -w @groceryview/ingestion && npm run test -w @groceryview/mobile && npm run test -w @groceryview/web && npm run ingest:verify && node --test tests/schema/*.test.mjs
